_comment: Authored by Claude. Daemon reads this on every loop. Update whenever thesis changes — daemon picks up within one tick. No numeric cap on alert count — every alert must be actively useful NOW (would you act on it with real money if it fires in the next hour?). Stale = remove. Signal-only / REMOTE / low-probability = remove.
pruned_by: 06:31 UTC tick — 8 bar_close M15 heartbeat events (all 9 instruments except BTC), NO entry triggers / structure BOS. All SKIP. Broker unchanged 0 pos $1000. NEW Apr 21 web intel: (1) ceasefire expires 0000 GMT WEDNESDAY Apr 22 (corrected — was stating Tuesday; per NPR/ABC). (2) Euronews: Iran PULLED OUT of Islamabad talks after US seized Iranian-flagged vessel, Tehran vowed swift response. (3) Conflicting Bloomberg: oil -1.1% Brent $94.44 on signs Iran WILL attend negotiations before ceasefire ends (after Mon +5.6%). (4) Trump says extension 'highly unlikely'. Net: market reading deal-still-possible despite walkout headline (oil fade, USD bid). Escalation tilt slightly stronger; tape not ratifying. Gold note refreshed with pulled-out + corrected timeline. iran_ceasefire query tuned (+pulled/withdraw/boycott). Other alerts unchanged. 1 alert MODIFIED (gold note), 4 KEEP (audusd/usdjpy/oil/usdcad). Structure_watch KEEP 9, news queries 1 TUNE 7 KEEP.

level_alerts.note: Break of 0.707 = prior pivot gone. Short on retest from below. SL 0.713, TP 0.700. Risk-off + AUD first-to-bleed. Catalyst MIXED Apr 21 06:07 UTC (corrected): ceasefire expires TODAY, Vance/Witkoff/Kushner flying Islamabad, supreme leader cleared delegates at last minute — market pricing DEAL optimism (USD bid, gold -0.79%). Risk-off trigger requires TALKS COLLAPSE tonight (Iran vowed retaliation for seized tanker). Level 0.707 is ~1.1% below current 0.7178 — requires real catalyst not just drift. Need M15 bear BOS + rejection wick on retest. Conv 2 (was 3 — catalyst not ratifying on Tue).

Break 158.50 = risk-off yen flight AND aligns w/ MoF pain threshold 158 (FXEmpire/MUFG Apr 16). Short on retest from below. Catalyst MIXED Apr 21 06:07 UTC (corrected from 'RATIFIED'): ceasefire expires TODAY but Vance/Witkoff/Kushner flying Islamabad, last-minute Iran clearance — market pricing DEAL optimism (USD bid ON, gold -0.79%, DXY bouncing). Yen flight requires TALKS COLLAPSE or retaliation on seized tanker. If deal optimism holds, USDJPY floats — no reason for 158.50 break. SL 159.20, TP 157.00. Conv 3 (was 4 — catalyst not ratifying today).

WTI $88.26 (CNBC Apr 21 -1.51%), Brent $94.87 (-0.68%), broker shows WTI $86.24 bearish M15. Oil FADING Tue on peace-talk optimism, NOT +6% as prior tick. Thesis MIXED: Iran T-0 today, Vance to Islamabad, Iran 'no talks under threats' — could flip either way. Break of $90 + M15 bull BOS signals ceasefire collapse. SL 87.50, TP1 94, TP2 98. Conv 3 (was 4 — oil not ratifying escalation as previously claimed).

Safe-haven long on pullback into 4780-4810. Zone re-entered 06:22 UTC at 4781.765 (2x re-fire post 06:04 sweep). BOTH fires SKIPPED: no M15 bull BOS, gold -0.79%, tape pricing deal optimism. Ceasefire expires 0000 GMT WED Apr 22 (corrected from Tue). Apr 21 intel: (a) Euronews Iran PULLED OUT of Islamabad talks post US vessel seizure, vowed swift response. (b) Bloomberg contradicts: oil -1.1% on signs Iran WILL attend — market reading deal-still-possible. (c) Trump: extension 'highly unlikely'. Escalation tilt stronger, tape unconvinced. Wait for M15 bull BOS + rejection wick on retest, OR news flash (collapse/strike/retaliation). If deal struck → $4700s SL bleed. SL 4745, TP 4900/5000. Conv 4.

H1 bear FVG zone. Alert FIRED passively 06:02 UTC at 1.36503 — SKIPPED: M15 bar_close showed NO bear BOS, bull FVG forming below. Oil catalyst WEAKENED: WTI $88.26 fading (not +6% $89 as prior tick). USDCAD actually RISING toward 1.3647 on weaker oil = CAD weak. Short thesis requires oil to RESUME rally (WTI break $90) AND M15 bear BOS. SL 1.3685, TP1 1.3600, TP2 1.3550. Conv 2 (was 4 — direction contradicted by current oil fade, kept as conditional only).
